title: dtn.c: Callback return value ignored, iteration continues after stop request
notes: Commit: 736d55c5c - Clarified callback semantics and stop logic in lichen_dtn_retrieve_for(); break now explicitly after removal. Matches doc in dtn.h. No longer ignores stop request.
close_reason: Logic clarified and documented (commit 736d55c5c). Callback stop now honored after current message retrieval.
